data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Minimum bid' but did not provide any evidence confirming that this requirement was satisfied. The linked use case mentions a minimum bid of $500, but there is no concrete API read or persisted state check that confirms this requirement was met during the saga run. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding the validation of the minimum bid requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the minimum bid requirement of $500 was satisfied.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
